steps.title: Count the cubes
steps.content:
The total number of cubes is
$$8+4+36+36=84$$
The cubes that are neither blue nor yellow are the red and white cubes:
$$8+4=12$$

steps.title: Simplify the probability
steps.content:
Use favorable outcomes over total outcomes:
$$\frac{12}{84}=\frac{1}{7}$$
The answer is D.
